summary: Pet Life Pass card in MOJO modal - WORKING CORRECTLY. The MembershipRewards component now shows the beautiful Pet Life Pass card with: TD logo, tier badge (Silver Star), pass number (TDC-XXXXXX), loyalty points (1,940), ₹ worth (₹970), and progress bar to next tier. Badges display correctly. Mobile responsiveness is excellent - full-screen modal with proper layout. Soul score consistency issue identified: Dashboard shows different values than API (Lola: dashboard 63% vs API 34%, Mystique: dashboard 72% vs API 64%).

integration_issues.issue: Dashboard ('Your Pets Soul Journey' section) shows different soul scores than what's returned from API and displayed in MOJO modal. Lola: Dashboard shows 63%, API returns 33.6%, MOJO shows 34%. Mystique: Dashboard shows 72%, API returns 64.3%

action_items: CRITICAL: Soul score consistency - FamilyDashboard.jsx getSoulCompleteness() calculates score based on doggy_soul_answers count (line 180-185), but MOJO modal uses API overall_score. Both should use the same source (overall_score from API)
MINOR: Pet Pass Number format in MOJO modal shows TDC-081789 but user mentioned format should be TDC-XXXXXX with last 6 digits of member ID
critical_code_review_comments: Pet Life Pass card implementation is excellent - matches dashboard design with gradient, progress bar, tier badges
Mobile responsiveness is well-implemented - full-screen modal with proper spacing
MembershipRewards component correctly fetches paw_points from member API (1940 points verified)
ISSUE: FamilyDashboard.jsx line 180-184 calculates soul score differently (count of doggy_soul_answers / 10 * 100) vs API overall_score
Badges array handling is correct - handles both string and object badge formats
Copy to clipboard functionality for pass number works correctly

success_rate.backend: 100% - API endpoints returning correct data (member profile, personalization-stats)
success_rate.frontend: 90% - Pet Life Pass working, soul score consistency issue needs fix

context_for_next_testing_agent: Pet Life Pass card in MOJO modal is fully functional. Main issue found: soul score inconsistency between dashboard (FamilyDashboard.jsx) and MOJO modal. Dashboard uses a custom calculation based on doggy_soul_answers count, while MOJO modal uses API overall_score. For Lola (pet-e6348b13c975): API returns 33.6%, dashboard shows 63%, MOJO shows 34%. This needs to be aligned - recommend using overall_score from API consistently.

pet_life_pass_card.title: Pet Life Pass - Visible
pet_life_pass_card.progress_bar: 3,060 points to Gold Crown at 39% - Visible
pet_life_pass_card.click_action: 'Click to view full card' text present
